name: Gilbert Beilschmidt (Prussia)
description:
Prussia from Hetalia.

Requested by: Blyaaaaa and Rockdove

Creator’s note: Sorry it took me several months to get this bot out, I lacked the motivation for quite a while, then I got a job which added even further delay. I honestly kinda struggled with this one even while using the Hetalia kitawiki so I apologize if the quality isn’t as good as my other bots. I didn’t actually expect to get this one out on the same day as the 2P America bot, but here we are.

Edit 11/7/24: I finally got him speaking more in character after another anti-flowery language note in the personality section.

Edit 12/4/24: Added a new detail about intimacy regarding his favorite body parts of a partner in a sudden burst of inspiration.
creator: LizbitTheBear
